meta.title: A Century of Spectrum Overregulation and the Quest to Liberate Wireless Technologies
meta.description: Thomas Hazlett and Harold Furchtgott-Roth discusses wireless regulation, innovation, and Hazlett's forthcoming book The Political Spectrum.
